We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects, one per question. Each object must have keys: "question" (string: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure"), "feedback" (string), "complies" (boolean). Evaluate the given text.

Text: "Bachelor’s work structure: Šis darbs ir sadalīts divās galvenajās daļās – teorētiskajā un praktiskajā. Teorētiskā daļa sniedz šī darba kontekstu. Tās saturs ir sadalīts trīs daļās. Pirmajā daļā ir izskaidrots vispārējais evakuācijas princips un evakuācijas principi slēgtās telpās, nodrošinot vispārīgu tēmas kontekstu. Otrajā daļā tiek analizēti Xiaomi arēnas plāni un izvērtētas tās evakuācijas iespējas. Trešajā daļā aplūkoti citi pētījumi, kas ir vērsti uz līdzīgām tēmām."

Question 1: Chapters. Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? It says two main parts: teorētiskajā un praktiskajā. Then within the theoretical part, three subparts. But it doesn't list the practical part's sections. So partially lists main sections: two main parts. It lists subparts of theoretical. But maybe not fully. So compliance: probably false because not fully listing all main sections. Provide feedback.

Question 2: Description. Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It describes theoretical part and its subparts. But not practical part. So partially. So compliance: false.

Question 3: Structure. Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? It gives some structure but missing practical part details. So maybe not fully clear. So compliance: false.

Thus all false. Provide feedback accordingly.

Let's craft feedback.

Chapters: "Text lists two main parts and three subparts of the theoretical part, but does not enumerate the practical part's sections, so the main structure is incomplete."

Description: "The description covers the theoretical part and its subparts but omits any details about the practical part, so the content of each main section is not fully described."

Structure: "The overall structure is partially conveyed, but the lack of detail on the practical part makes it difficult to grasp the full thesis layout."

Return JSON array.
